announcementsEnable.description: Enable or disable the Announcements module.

motdEnable.description: Enable or disable the Message of the Day (MOTD) module.

mentionsEnable.description: Enable or disable the player @mentions module.

restartEnable.description: Enable or disable the scheduled server Restart module.

debugEnable.description: Enable or disable debug logging for Paradigm modules. This can be very verbose.

defaultLanguage.description: The default language for translatable messages. E.g., 'en', 'de', 'es'.

commandManagerEnable.description: Enable or disable the custom Command Manager for custom commands.

internalPermissionsEnable.description: Enable or disable Paradigm internal permissions/groups (permissions.json and /paradigm group).

telemetryEnable.description: Enables anonymous telemetry (server count, online players). Sends only anonymized metrics.

webEditorTestUrl.description: When enabled, use the local web editor test URL (http://localhost:8083) instead of production.

spawnWorld.description: Global spawn world id (set via /setspawn). Empty means spawn is not configured.

gamemodeCommandsEnable.description: Enable or disable /gamemode and gm aliases.
